source: Ferrovial Equity Story & Fact Book (AFM register)
usBase: Ferrovial re-domiciled to the Netherlands (2023) and listed on Nasdaq (9 May 2024) to broaden its US investor base and re-rate toward US infrastructure peers. North America is ~27% of the institutional register (Dec-2024) — the metric IR aims to grow, given ~80–86% of equity value is North American. BlackRock has been building since Nasdaq-100 inclusion (Dec-2025).

governance.chairman: Rafael del Pino y Calvo-Sotelo (Executive Chairman)
governance.votingRights: One-share-one-vote — no dual-class shares, no golden shares. Control rests on ordinary-share aggregation.

capital.buyback: Up to €800m (max 15m shares, ~2.04%), Dec 2025 → Oct 2026, executed by Goldman Sachs.
capital.dividend: Ferrovial Flexible Dividend (scrip): shareholders elect new shares or cash; treasury shares cancelled to offset dilution.
